name: 2pk Stacking Wire Laundry Baskets with Wooden Handles - Brightroom™
description:
Save space and simplify laundry day with these 2-Pack Stacking Wire Laundry Baskets with Wooden Handles from Brightroom™. Made from metal with an open design for ventilation, these laundry baskets are stackable to conserve space and feature sleek wooden handles for classic look that's functional and appealing.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
